Zcurve48_AA.x	Zcurve48_AA.y	Zcurve48_AA.z	Zcurve48_AC.x	Zcurve48_AC.y	Zcurve48_AC.z	Zcurve48_AG.x	Zcurve48_AG.y	Zcurve48_AG.z	Zcurve48_AT.x	Zcurve48_AT.y	Zcurve48_AT.z	Zcurve48_CA.x	Zcurve48_CA.y	Zcurve48_CA.z	Zcurve48_CC.x	Zcurve48_CC.y	Zcurve48_CC.z	Zcurve48_CG.x	Zcurve48_CG.y	Zcurve48_CG.z	Zcurve48_CT.x	Zcurve48_CT.y	Zcurve48_CT.z	Zcurve48_GA.x	Zcurve48_GA.y	Zcurve48_GA.z	Zcurve48_GC.x	Zcurve48_GC.y	Zcurve48_GC.z	Zcurve48_GG.x	Zcurve48_GG.y	Zcurve48_GG.z	Zcurve48_GT.x	Zcurve48_GT.y	Zcurve48_GT.z	Zcurve48_TA.x	Zcurve48_TA.y	Zcurve48_TA.z	Zcurve48_TC.x	Zcurve48_TC.y	Zcurve48_TC.z	Zcurve48_TG.x	Zcurve48_TG.y	Zcurve48_TG.z	Zcurve48_TT.x	Zcurve48_TT.y	Zcurve48_TT.z
